sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110886" key="fila/rxwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλάρχ-ων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n110886.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving the rulers,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristox.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
